ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "gameid" TEXT /* Identifier for the game condition used */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the experiment */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Round number within the experiment */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant involved in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., decision-making, cognitive response) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the response */,
  "click_status" INTEGER /* Status of the click (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "click_col_h" INTEGER /* High value of the clicked column */,
  "click_col_s" INTEGER /* Medium value of the clicked column */,
  "click_col_l" INTEGER /* Low value of the clicked column */,
  "click_loc_s" INTEGER /* Location of the click */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their response */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data points or observations related to the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternative_responses" (
  "alt_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative response entry */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main response entry */,
  "alt1_col_h" INTEGER /* High value of the first alternative column */,
  "alt1_col_s" INTEGER /* Medium value of the first alternative column */,
  "alt1_col_l" INTEGER /* Low value of the first alternative column */,
  "alt1_loc_s" INTEGER /* Location of the first alternative response */,
  "alt1_loc_lalt2_status" INTEGER /* Status of the second alternative response location */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the alternative response was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their alternative response */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data points or observations related to the alternative response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alt_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternative_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternative_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the outcome */,
  "d1d2_diff" INTEGER /* Difference between two decision points */,
  "outcome" INTEGER /* Final outcome of the experiment (True/False) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "outcome_time" TEXT /* Time when the outcome was determined */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data points or observations related to the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "click_data" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click data entry */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response entry */,
  "click_loc_lalt1_status" INTEGER /* Status of the alternative location for the first alternative response */,
  "alt2_col_h" INTEGER /* High value of the second alternative column */,
  "alt2_col_s" INTEGER /* Medium value of the second alternative column */,
  "alt2_col_l" INTEGER /* Low value of the second alternative column */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "click_time" TEXT /* Time when the click was made */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data points or observations related to the click */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_data_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., researcher, subject) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "participation_count" INTEGER /* Number of experiments the participant has participated in */,
  "last_participation_date" TEXT /* Date of the participant's last experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the researcher has */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Researcher's area of specialization */,
  "last_experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last experiment conducted by the researcher */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action logged */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., start, end) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., start, end, note) */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data points or observations related to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quality check results */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., data validation, integrity check) */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data points or observations related to the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
